steps.t: Grazadh-gropor can be found in the south-east part of Misthallow. You should search Grazadh-gropor for signs of little-folk.
Léothred can be found at Thokvist. You should talk to Léothred.
The Cabed Rhimdath can be found west of Thokvist in Misthallow. You should head for the Cabed Rhimdath.
The Cabed Rhimdath can be found in the south-west of Misthallow. You should explore the Cabed Rhimdath.
The Cabed Rhimdath can be found in the south-west of Misthallow. You should talk to Fanglind in the Cabed Rhimdath.
The Cabed Rhimdath can be found in the south-west of Misthallow. You should explore the Cabed Rhimdath.
The Cabed Rhimdath can be found in the south-west of Misthallow. You should talk to Fanglind in the Cabed Rhimdath.
The Cabed Rhimdath can be found in the south-west of Misthallow. You should explore the Cabed Rhimdath.
The Cabed Rhimdath can be found in the south-west of Misthallow. You should talk to Fanglind in the Cabed Rhimdath.
The Cabed Rhimdath can be found in the south-west of Misthallow. You should travel to the end of the Cabed Rhimdath.
Fanglind is just outside Lyndelby in Misthallow. You should talk to Fanglind.
Lyndelby can be found in Misthallow. You should learn the history of the Rohirrim with Léothred.
Lyndelby can be found in Misthallow. You should learn the history of the Rohirrim with Léothred.
Léothred can be found in Lyndelby. You should talk to Léothred.
Léothred can be found at Thokvist. You should talk to Léothred.
